reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS SO BAD DO NOT DOWNLOAD IT
reviews.review_description: Ok I will tell you why I know this game is horrible first they give you mods but there are a bunch of 7 year old flying second I have been banned 2 time the first on I got banned for saying one cuss word that's not so bad the second time I seen this owner in a lobby one time then I joined another lobby and seen him and said OMG can I plz get a Pic I seen you in the other lobby but you left too fast then he ran to the leader board and I said why are you muting me no he was  reporting me for saying can I get a Pic BTW if you see a dude with a coconut hat with a all black color code with nails and the trusted stick report him and video him and ask for a Pic if he reports you send the video to discord plzz I wasn't recording then it happend and his name is all pppppppps  but ifyou flick tag you get banned this game is not good do not download l2cky your owner should not be reporting people for asking for a goddamn Pic take his owner privileges away from this person

The Game now shows the map of the thumbnail, when i was away from the place to call My Mom, the Game was still fine before but when i got back it just showed a simple map and i got like "WTF THAT WAS NOT SUPPOSED TO HAPPEN!"

Please fix dis Dawg$hጎt i don't wanna Ran out of one of the Best Gorilla Tag Copies Pls 🥀

so i just download this game and i'm gonna start playing it so i joined and i see this giant what was the sudden i joined and it kept not loading me in the real one so it kept i don't know what to do in this game so it's sox don't download this game end the owners needs to fix this
I was a old mod and the game was apparently gonna shut down but it didn’t and everyone in the discord said leave but when i left they demoted me and everyone got promoted

This game is so fun they have so many mod menus most mods are bannable in pubs like fly, one of the best gtag modded fan games I’ve played the mods admins and owners are really fun to play with and are really nice.

This game has 3 mod menus and 1 fortnite emote wheel. The mods are very good and you can also turn on minecraft world it is pretty cool but you can’t do it in public’s it’s bannable sphere platforms are the best platforms ive ever seen, and there is trusted user i have it and infinite shiny rocks but don’t put too many mods or else your game will lag and maybe crash, and also don’t use bannable mods in a public lobby you have a high chance to get banned
